tools.name: generate_suggestions
tools.description: START HERE for any deployment. STEP 1: Call detect_region or detect_providers. STEP 2: Call this tool with the detected region. Returns Starter/MVP/Startup/Enterprise options with monthly costs. When the response includes a clarificationRequest, answer the suggested questions and call again with req

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Get a detailed monthly estimate for a cloud resource.

tools.name: list_credentials
tools.description: Check cloud provider credential configuration without exposing secrets.

tools.name: detect_region
tools.description: Detect the configured region for a cloud provider. Call this before generate_suggestions.

tools.name: detect_providers
tools.description: Detect all configured cloud providers and their regions. Returns a list of providers with their detected regions and configuration status.

tools.name: deploy
tools.description: Provision the explicitly selected suggestion through the Execution API. Never call before presenting options and receiving user approval. The deploy fee is held from the account credit balance and captured only after verification passes (failed deployments are free). On HTTP 402, call top_up and ret

tools.name: get_deployment_status
tools.description: Check deployment progress and retrieve verification evidence when complete.

tools.name: destroy
tools.description: Destroy all resources owned by a deployment.

tools.name: list_deployments
tools.description: List deployments tracked by the Execution API.

tools.name: teardown_latest
tools.description: Destroy the newest active deployment, or all active deployments when all=true.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get the account credit balance (total, held, available USD). Call this when deploy fails with HTTP 402 insufficient_credits.

tools.name: top_up
tools.description: Add credits to the account. rail=xrp returns an XRP deposit address, REQUIRED destination tag, and exact unique amount to send (credited automatically on ledger confirmation — agent pays). rail=stripe returns a Stripe Checkout URL (human pays).

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "list_credentials" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Check cloud provider credential configuration without exposing secrets.
